name: David Heyman
text: Angelo’s by Le Milano Antibes is a family-run restaurant, and from the moment we walked in, the hospitality was extraordinary. We were greeted with prosecco. We had a salmon tartare to start and I had bronzino for my main course. At the end of the meal, they treated us to limoncello. When Ellen complimented the owner, she asked if she could kiss us. We will remember this meal for a long time.

text: Accueil chaleureux. Personnel souriant, aimable et drôle ! Pas d'attente entre les plats. Produits frais et de qualité et quantite généreuse ! J'ai retrouvé le goût des plats de mon enfance ! (Mezze maniche alla 'nduja). La cuisson du bar et des petits légumes était juste incroyable ! Merci d'amener un peu d'Italie en France !
textTranslated: A warm welcome. Smiling, friendly, and funny staff! No waiting between courses. Fresh, high-quality ingredients and generous portions! I rediscovered the taste of my childhood dishes! (Mezze maniche alla 'nduja). The sea bass and vegetables were cooked to perfection! Thank you for bringing a little bit of Italy to France!

title: Angelo’s by Le Milano Antibes

name: Olena Samolevych
text:
Мы вдвоем посетили этот ресторан. Заказали два бокала пива, одну пиццу и салат.

В салате оказался песок, из-за чего есть его было неприятно. Мы попросили заменить блюдо. Морепродукты в салате были холодные, скорее всего из банки и просто из холодильника, то есть не приготовленные свежими. За такую цену ожидаешь более качественные и свежие продукты. При этом никакого извинения или скидки за испорченное блюдо нам предложено не было.

За два пива (0,25 и бутылочное 0,33), одну пиццу и салат мы заплатили 50 евро. Считаю, что это довольно дорого для такого качества еды и обслуживания
textTranslated:
The two of us visited this restaurant. We ordered two beers, a pizza, and a salad.

The salad had sand in it, making it unpleasant to eat. We asked for a replacement. The seafood in the salad was cold, likely canned or simply refrigerated, not freshly prepared. For that price, you'd expect better, fresher food. However, we weren't offered any apology or discount for the spoiled dish.

We paid 50 euros for two beers (0.25 and a bottled 0.33), a pizza, and a salad. I think that's quite expensive for the quality of the food and service.
address: 2 Rue de la Tourraque, 06600 Antibes, France
title: Angelo’s by Le Milano Antibes

name: PL Gareau
text:
Une expérience absolument parfaite. Un immense merci aux deux propriétaires qui nous ont accueillis avec beaucoup de chaleur et qui nous ont servis de façon impeccable tout au long du repas.

Tous les plats étaient délicieux, d’une fraîcheur remarquable et manifestement préparés avec des produits frais et de qualité supérieure. On sent le soin et la passion dans chaque assiette.  Tout est pensé dans les moindres détails.

Un endroit exceptionnel que je recommande sans hésiter. Nous y retournerons avec grand plaisir.
textTranslated:
An absolutely perfect experience. A huge thank you to the two owners who welcomed us so warmly and served us impeccably throughout the meal.

All the dishes were delicious, remarkably fresh, and clearly prepared with top-quality, fresh ingredients. You can taste the care and passion in every plate. Everything is meticulously planned.

An exceptional place that I wholeheartedly recommend. We will definitely be back.

text:
Compte tenu des avis, je n ai peut etre pas eu de chance mais ce jeudi 9 avril 2026 je suis venue dejeuner et le saumon n etait pas frais (gout et odeur). IL n y avait pas d ambiguité et donc pas de probleme pour le changer et apparemment c etait le fournisseur. Les commandes de saumon ont ete modifiees  aux autres tables.
On m a juste offert mon café alors que bon c est tres tres desagreable...j ai ete en decalage en plus avec les personnes de ma table qui avaient finit de dejeuner quand j ai eu le second plat.
Donc ce geste d offrir un kf alors que je considere le probleme grave ne m a pas convenu. J aurais pu etre gravement malade.
textTranslated:
Based on the reviews, I may have just been unlucky, but on Thursday, April 9, 2026, I came for lunch and the salmon wasn't fresh (taste and smell). There was no ambiguity, so there was no problem replacing it, and apparently, it was the supplier's fault. The salmon orders were changed for the other tables.
I was only offered a free coffee, which is very, very unpleasant... I was also out of sync with the people at my table who had finished lunch when I received my second course.
So, this gesture of offering a free coffee when I consider the problem serious was unacceptable. I could have been seriously ill.

text:
Merci, pour cette soiree d'anniversaire très réussie. Je m'en souviendrais.  Mes invités et moi même étions ravis. Merci à l'équipe pour votre professionnalisme et votre enthousiasme. Discrets mais présents et à l'écoute. Ce sont des qualités tres précieuses.
Nous avons pris des plats à la carte et nous étions tous contents de nos assiettes.
Au départ, je souhaitais faire la soiree au bistrot and co, mais il fut fermé pendant quelques semaines et donc j'ai demandé à le faire au bistrot teatro et c'était parfait. Très intimiste. Encore merci et à tres bientôt.
textTranslated:
Thank you for a very successful birthday party. I will remember it fondly. My guests and I were delighted. Thank you to the team for your professionalism and enthusiasm. Discreet yet attentive and responsive, these are invaluable qualities.

We ordered à la carte and we were all very happy with our meals.
Initially, I wanted to hold the party at Bistrot & Co, but it was closed for a few weeks, so I asked to have it at Bistrot Teatro instead, and it was perfect. Very intimate. Thank you again, and see you very soon.

textTranslated: The charcuterie is excellent, truly high quality, but the quantity is very limited and €28 is still too expensive for what you get on your plate. What a shame!
title: Le Zinc

name: Jordan Osteraas
text: Cannot speak highly enough of Le Zinc. Amazing setting and the best ravioli we had on our entire trip (and this was right after Italy). If you’re in Antibes come here for lunch, dinner, whatever. Make sure you get dessert and the digestive to really cap off your experience. Incredible service and the kindest staff. 10/10. Would move to Antibes just for Le Zinc
title: Le Zinc

name: kristjan magnusson
text: Te hacen sentir que molestas. Te sirven mal y te hablan muy antipaticos. Si eres turista. No eres bienvenido. No lo recomiendo y por supuesto no volveré
textTranslated: They make you feel like you're bothering them. The service is poor and they're very unfriendly. If you're a tourist, you're not welcome. I don't recommend it and I certainly won't be back.
title: Le Zinc

name: キングスライム
text: 風が強かったので店内の席を利用。外は結構混んでいたので外の席が良ければ早めに行くのがおすすめです。プロバンスのワイン2杯とハムのみの盛り合わせ、スズキ、ステーキを2人で食べたらかなりお腹いっぱいになりました。料理はどれもおいしいです。スタッフの方も英語が通じます。オシャレだけど、差別などなく親子2人で落ち着いて食事ができました。
textTranslated: It was windy, so we sat inside. It was quite crowded outside, so if you'd like a seat outside, I recommend going early. After two glasses of Provençal wine, a ham platter, sea bass, and steak for two, we were quite full. All the food was delicious. The staff spoke English. It was a stylish place, but there was no discrimination, so my family and I were able to enjoy a relaxing meal.
title: Le Zinc

name: James B
text: Le Zinc is an adorable restaurant, the delicious food, the atmosphere, the reasonable price and the really delightful people who work here, it's right in the centre of vieux Antibes but doesn't at all have the slightly touristy feeling of some of the other places. I've been on my own a couple of times this week and felt very welcome and relaxed, recommended *****

textTranslated: Extremely friendly service. The food was delicious (beef tartare and pasta in asparagus cream sauce). The wine selection was very good, but they also had beer. A typical French atmosphere. We'll definitely be back! 😊

Merci

name: M 06
text:
Une expérience culinaire exceptionnelle au restaurant Terre et Mer à Juan-les-Pins ! 🌊🥂
Tout était parfait du début à la fin : un accueil souriant, un service attentionné et des plats qui subliment aussi bien la terre que la mer. Les produits sont frais, les cuissons maîtrisées et la présentation raffinée. Mention pour le risotto aux fruits de mer »] — un vrai délice ! 😋
Le cadre est charmant, idéal pour un dîner romantique ou une belle soirée entre amis.
Un grand bravo à toute l’équipe pour leur passion et leur professionnalisme. Une adresse à recommander sans hésitation ! 👏💫
textTranslated:
An exceptional culinary experience at the Terre et Mer restaurant in Juan-les-Pins! 🌊🥂
Everything was perfect from start to finish: a warm welcome, attentive service, and dishes that beautifully showcase both land and sea. The ingredients are fresh, the cooking is expertly executed, and the presentation is refined. Special mention for the seafood risotto—a true delight! 😋
The setting is charming, ideal for a romantic dinner or a lovely evening with friends.
A huge congratulations to the entire team for their passion and professionalism. A restaurant to recommend without hesitation! 👏💫

Tous les plats étaient savoureux, mais ce qui m’a vraiment marqué, ce sont les desserts fantastiques : créatifs, gourmands et parfaitement exécutés. Un endroit à ne pas manquer pour un repas de qualité et un moment agréable en toute convivialité.

An exceptional culinary experience!”
The Brasserie Sophocle in Antibes is a real favorite. The welcome is warm and the service impeccable. All the dishes were delicious, but what really impressed me were the fantastic desserts: creative, delicious, and perfectly executed. A place not to be missed for a quality meal and a pleasant, friendly experience.

La cuisine, l’ambiance et le service sont excellents. Même si la carte n’est pas très étendue, on peut être certain que chaque plat est délicieux.
textTranslated:
This restaurant is a true gem. I personally prefer to visit outside of peak tourist season, when you can truly enjoy a local experience with only a few tables inside.

The food, ambiance, and service are excellent. Even though the menu isn't extensive, you can be sure that every dish is delicious.

textTranslated: A wonderful experience. We went for New Year's Eve dinner... we were worried that given this was the perfect evening, we'd be disappointed, but they far exceeded all our expectations. è uno dei pochi posti ad Antibes dove è possibile mangiare senza glutine.

ci torneremo.

Excellent restaurant with gluten-free options

textTranslated: Nice table, the menu is a bit limited, the food is good, but the presentation could use a little more effort, which is understandable given the season, although other nearby establishments make a difference... Friendly service, warm welcome... But when you see the prices, at €18 for the warm goat cheese salad which only has two flat pieces of goat cheese, four chopped cherry tomatoes, and two lettuce leaves, you realize that even if it's good, it's expensive for a slice of goat cheese... The next course, roast pork with prunes, was €28 for three slices of potato and four thin slices of pork... At that point, you realize you'll leave hungry, so we didn't order the cheese plate for €12... Mr. Owner, who is very welcoming, change your approach, or your shoulder won't hold up for long... We'll come back to see if you've changed your strategy.

text:
Этот ресторан стал для меня настоящим местом с душой ✨

Я впервые пришла сюда на завтрак — и уже тогда поняла, что это особенное место: уютная атмосфера, невероятно вкусная еда и внимательное, тёплое обслуживание. Но именно здесь я решила провести свой день рождения… и это было лучшее решение ✨

Всё было на высшем уровне — от изысканных блюд до каждой детали сервиса. Персонал сделал этот день по-настоящему незабываемым: забота, искренние улыбки и ощущение, что ты здесь желанный гость.

Спасибо за этот идеальный праздник, за эмоции и атмосферу, в которую хочется возвращаться снова и снова 💫✨🔥
textTranslated:
This restaurant has become a true place with a soul for me ✨

I came here for breakfast for the first time, and even then I knew it was something special: a cozy atmosphere, incredibly delicious food, and attentive, warm service. But I chose to spend my birthday here... and it was the best decision ✨

Everything was top-notch—from the exquisite dishes to every detail of the service. The staff made the day truly unforgettable: their care, sincere smiles, and the feeling of being a welcome guest.

Thank you for this perfect celebration, for the emotions and atmosphere that make you want to return again and again 💫✨🔥
title: Unique Restaurant Antibes Juan-les-Pins

name: Sydney Davies
text:
Wonderful food and friendly service. The staff were amazing, not only serving delicious food but they also gave us advice on local amenities and sites of interest to see while we are here in Juan le Pins and Antibes. They also speak several languages, including English and French, which made ordering food and  conversation a pleasure.
We were served tasty canapés while we chose our meals. I selected pasta while my wife chose fish. Both meals were cooked to perfection with high quality, delicious ingredients and superb vegetable accompaniments.
It was my wife's birthday and the hosts made it a truly memorable experience for her. She will cherish the memories for ever.
We also enjoyed a delicious breakfast at the restaurant one morning. The times we spent there have left us with memories we will cherish from our holiday in this beautiful region.

name: Oksana Hus
text:
Vous verrez peut être plusieurs de nos commentaires sur d'autres restaurants d'Antibes :en séjour avec mon conjoint, nous avons testé 4 adresses du vieil Antibes du 7 au 11 novembre. Nous mangions tôt le matin à l'hotel (type brunch) puis nous partions à la journée en VTT explorer les alentours (L'Esterel, Aspremont etc) et le soir venu nous en profitions pour découvrir les bonnes adresses de la ville. Nous sommes sportifs, et nous arrivions généralement en ayant grand faim.

Nous nous sommes régalés au Comptoir, avec une carte qui faisait tellement envie que nous avons pris toutes les entrées pour les goûter. Des produits de qualité, de saison, des assiettes jolies et bien fournies (le thon mi cuit était délicieux et vraiment bien servi, plus faim ensuite pour un dessert). Mention spéciale pour la mousse de pomme de terre à la truffe, c'était un vrai délice, on va s'en souvenir longtemps ^^
Le serveur était seul en salle, mais a très bien géré notre service, alors que le restaurant était bondé. Le restaurant en lui même est chaleureux, vivement conseillé de réserver !
Merci à l'équipe et bonne continuation :)
textTranslated:
You might see several of our reviews for other restaurants in Antibes: during our stay with my partner, we tried four different places in Old Antibes from November 7th to 11th. We ate early in the morning at the hotel (brunch-style) and then went for a day of mountain biking to explore the surrounding area (L'Esterel, Aspremont, etc.). In the evenings, we took the opportunity to discover the best spots in town. We're active, and we usually arrived very hungry.

We had a wonderful meal at Le Comptoir, with a menu that looked so tempting that we ordered all the appetizers to try them. The ingredients were high-quality and seasonal, and the plates were beautifully presented and generous (the seared tuna was delicious and very well portioned; we were too full for dessert afterward). Special mention goes to the truffle potato mousse; it was a real treat, we'll remember it for a long time! ^^ The waiter was alone in the dining room but managed our service very well, even though the restaurant was packed. The restaurant itself is very welcoming; reservations are highly recommended!
Thanks to the team and best of luck! :)

name: Mathilde Mougeot
text:
Une très belle découverte ✨

Un petit restaurant plein de charme, végétarien, vegan, avec même des options sans gluten — et surtout, tout est fait maison… et c’est absolument délicieux !

J’ai pris une salade sans gluten, elle était incroyable, et la sauce au seitan… je l’ai adorée.
En accompagnement, j’ai choisi un kimchi, lui aussi sans gluten : une vraie découverte pour moi, et en toute transparence, j’ai adorée.

Mes parents ont pris des naans fourrés, et ils ont tout simplement adoré.
Tout était savoureux, bien préparé et plein de goût. Nos papilles voyagent, et c’est exactement ce que j’aime.
Le voyage culinaire est ce qu’il y a de meilleur, et PICNIC nous l’offre à merveille.

On a passé un excellent moment en famille, un de ces moments précieux que l’on chérit tendrement. Que ce soit en famille, en amoureux ou entre amis, je vous recommande d’y aller, vous en serez ravis.

Le rapport qualité-prix est tout simplement incroyable.
Vraiment, ils sont parfaits.

Mais au-delà de la cuisine, l’accueil fait toute la différence.
Le duo est adorable, gentil, serviable et attentionné… des personnes comme on en rencontre rarement et que l’on n’oublie pas 🌸

Ils sont tellement attachants qu’on aurait envie de les garder rien que pour nous (mais promis, on partage 😄).
Et en plus, ils sont juste en bas de notre immeuble… autant dire que c’est le rêve 🫶🏼

Un lieu simple, sincère, authentique, rempli de bonnes ondes, de douceur, d’amour et de tendresse, que je recommande avec un immense plaisir 🤍

Merci PICNIC, vous êtes des amours 🌸🫶🏼
textTranslated:
A wonderful discovery ✨

A charming little restaurant, vegetarian, vegan, with even gluten-free options—and best of all, everything is homemade… and absolutely delicious!

I had a gluten-free salad, it was incredible, and the seitan sauce… I loved it.
To go with it, I chose kimchi, also gluten-free: a real discovery for me, and to be perfectly honest, I loved it.

My parents ordered stuffed naan, and they simply adored it.

Everything was flavorful, well-prepared, and bursting with taste. Our taste buds traveled, and that's exactly what I love.

A culinary journey is the best thing, and PICNIC offers it wonderfully.

We had a fantastic time as a family, one of those precious moments that we cherish. Whether with family, a loved one, or friends, I highly recommend going; you won't be disappointed.

The value for money is simply incredible.

Seriously, they're perfect.

But beyond the food, the welcome makes all the difference.
The duo is adorable, kind, helpful, and attentive… the kind of people you rarely meet and never forget 🌸

They're so endearing that you almost want to keep them all to yourself (but we promise, we'll share 😄).

And what's more, they're right downstairs from our building… needless to say, it's a dream come true 🫶🏼

A simple, sincere, authentic place, filled with good vibes, gentleness, love, and tenderness, which I recommend with immense pleasure 🤍

Thank you PICNIC, you're the best 🌸🫶🏼

text:
The facade of this eatery caught my attention with its pool tile lettering and drew me into its unsuspecting treasure trove of vegetarian delights. On display on the counter sat a myriad of vegetarian and vegan choice meals waiting to exhibit their flavors on my palate. I went with the bacon mushroom sandwich and headed to the park to eat what I thought was just a sandwich. Boy was I wrong. Upon taking my first bite my taste buds were elated. The flavors blended phenomenally well together to create what I can only refer to as ‘the perfect bite’. Needless to say, my appetite is already beseeching me to go back and try more of the menu. TBC.

Editing my review after eating here again today and all I can say is I must have went to vegan heaven because nothing’s that divine. This place right here is the Michelin star of vegan restaurants.
title: Picnic Antibes

name: Alessandro Silva
text: Ottime Galettes, locale elegante e servizio perfetto. Personale gentile, porzioni abbondanti e crepes salate fatte con materie prime ottime!
textTranslated: Excellent galettes, elegant setting, and perfect service. Friendly staff, generous portions, and savory crepes made with top-quality ingredients!
title: Miam Antibes

name: tricia
text:
I found this recommended by goggle reviews and it was right on. Extremely immaculate restaurant  I enjoyed wonderful bottle of orange juice, cappuccino, prosciutto and burrata crepe with a creative salad on the side.  Delicious and highly recommend this restaurant. No outside dinning but it was bright and welcoming.  I  was there during off time but when I left it was full. Great job gentlemen.  I may return prior to my departure and order the duck crepe the owner recommended!  Sorry, bite of crepe before I remembered to take a picture
!
title: Miam Antibes

name: Axel P
text:
Pour moi, la meilleure crêperie Antiboise. Et j'en ai fait des crêperies ! Tout est parfait, et certains détails comme la façon dont est disposé le jambon dans la crêpe ou le poivre sur l'œuf ainsi que les fruits secs dans la salade ont su retenir mon attention et faire de cette adresse un incontournable. Les crêpes salées comme sucrées sont divines et bien garnies. De plus, les prix sont corrects.
1 seul conseil : foncez !
textTranslated:
For me, the best crêperie in Antibes. And I've been to a lot of crêperies! Everything is perfect, and details like the way the ham is arranged in the crêpe, the pepper on the egg, and the dried fruit in the salad really caught my eye and made this place a must-try. Both the savory and sweet crêpes are divine and generously filled. Plus, the prices are reasonable.

My only advice: go for it!

name: Devaja Shah
text: Crepes are to die for

name: Samantha Lau
text: Duck crepe with goat cheese and fig ham was fire 🔥 Owners were super nice too. I carried back 2 sweet crepes back to Cannes so my friends would try it and they loved it too. The inside is also nicely decorated and very relaxing to have a glass of rose while enjoying the crepe.

name: Lou Riviere

name: Artur Vetershpan
text:
We visited Miam as a couple and had a very pleasant experience. The interior is minimalist, stylish, and very comfortable, creating a relaxed atmosphere. The staff were extremely polite, attentive, and welcoming.

The crêpes were delicious — very authentic, with a real Normandy feeling. A special mention for the fresh green salad served alongside the crêpes: the greens were genuinely fresh and young, with nuts and an excellent dressing that made the side dish stand out on its own.

A very good place in Antibes for crêpes, brunch, or a light lunch. We will definitely come back next time.

name: Raj Amarnani
text: Wonderful crepes and fantastic service! Definitely would recommend, some of the best crepes we've ever had!

Nous avons passé un agréable moment nous reviendrons et recommandons vivement

We had a lovely time, we will definitely return, and we highly recommend it.

The prices are average, but the quality/price ratio is excellent.

Ulrich

text: Nous voulions aller dîner chez Jeanne depuis longtemps, et nous n’avons pas été déçus ! Cuisine engagée produits locaux et de saison et le petit twist qui change la donne. Mention spéciale pour la carte courte équilibrée et avec un plat végétarien parmi les 2 proposés. Et bien sûr la carte de vins que nous devons retourner tester !
textTranslated: We'd been wanting to have dinner at Jeanne's for ages, and we weren't disappointed! The cuisine is committed to local and seasonal produce, with a little twist that makes all the difference. Special mention goes to the short, well-balanced menu, which includes one vegetarian dish among the two offered. And of course, the wine list, which we absolutely must go back to try!
title: Jeanne

name: Samar Aoun
text: Nous avons passé une super soirée. C est délicieux et le serveur très sympa,  il n a pas hésité à nous faire goûter plusieurs vins pour trouver celui qui nous convient.
textTranslated: We had a great evening. The food was delicious and the waiter was very friendly; he didn't hesitate to let us taste several wines to find the one we liked best.
title: Jeanne

reviewContext.Vegetarian options: Plats et entrées végétariennes à la carte

name: Yaro Henza
text:
La musique provenant de cet établissement est extrêmement forte et se poursuit très tard (jusqu’à environ 5h du matin), même en semaine. Ce n’est pas un simple bruit de fond - on a l’impression d’être dans une boîte de nuit à l’intérieur de l’appartement.

Cela rend le sommeil très difficile et affecte la qualité de vie des résidents à proximité.

Je comprends qu’il s’agit d’un restaurant, mais il devrait y avoir un contrôle raisonnable du niveau sonore la nuit ainsi qu’un respect pour les habitants du quartier.
textTranslated:
The music from this establishment is extremely loud and continues very late (until around 5 a.m.), even on weekdays. It's not just background noise—it feels like there's a nightclub inside the apartment.

This makes sleeping very difficult and affects the quality of life for nearby residents.

I understand it's a restaurant, but there should be reasonable noise control at night and respect for the neighbors.
title: Jeanne

name: Dylan E
text: Excellent food and wine!
title: Jeanne

name: Jil Ko
text: toujours une réussite de venir dîner chez Jeanne ! j'y emmène souvent des copains, et c'est un sans faute systématique : les portions sont adaptées, les assiettes sont hyper bien travaillées, les produits raffinés et goutus, les plats se déclinent en version végé sur demande pour plaire à tout le monde... comme d'habitude le choix des vins est exceptionnel, et les proprios aux petits oignons toute la soirée ! merci encore, c'est un vrai plaisir de pouvoir venir depuis des années, et toujours être agréablement surprise de l'accueil et des plats 💛
textTranslated: It's always a pleasure to dine at Jeanne's! I often take friends there, and it's consistently flawless: the portions are just right, the dishes are beautifully presented, the ingredients are refined and flavorful, and vegetarian options are available upon request to please everyone... as usual, the wine selection is exceptional, and the owners are incredibly attentive all evening! Thank you again, it's a real pleasure to be able to come for years, and always be pleasantly surprised by the welcome and the food 💛

We had visited La Cafetière Fêlée a few years ago and were already impressed by the quality and originality of the dishes, as well as the warm welcome. une belle découverte.

name: E QUEEN
text:
Siamo capitati per caso in questo ristorante ed è stata una scoperta meravigliosa ✨

Abbiamo scelto piatti locali… semplicemente deliziosi, preparati con cura e pieni di sapore. Il rosé della Provenza era fantastico, perfetto per accompagnare la cena e rendere l’atmosfera ancora più speciale 🍷

Il dolce, con caramello e croccante, era davvero eccezionale… uno di quelli che ti restano impressi 😍

Un grazie speciale alla signora katy che ci ha seguiti: deliziosa, gentilissima e dolcissima, ci ha fatto sentire accolti e coccolati dall’inizio alla fine.

Un’esperienza al top sotto ogni punto di vista… assolutamente 5 stelle ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
textTranslated:
We stumbled upon this restaurant by chance, and it was a wonderful discovery ✨

We chose local dishes… simply delicious, carefully prepared, and full of flavor. The Provençal rosé was fantastic, perfect to accompany dinner and make the atmosphere even more special 🍷

The dessert, with caramel and brittle, was truly exceptional… one of those that stays in your memory 😍

A special thanks to Mrs. Katy who looked after us: delightful, kind, and sweet, she made us feel welcomed and pampered from start to finish.

A top-notch experience in every way… absolutely 5 stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

name: Oksana Hus
text:
Vous verrez peut être plusieurs de nos commentaires sur d'autres restaurants d'Antibes :en séjour avec mon conjoint, nous avons testé 4 adresses du vieil Antibes du 7 au 11 novembre. Nous mangions tôt le matin à l'hotel (type brunch) puis nous partions à la journée en VTT explorer les alentours (L'Esterel, Aspremont etc) et le soir venu nous en profitions pour découvrir les bonnes adresses de la ville. Nous sommes sportifs, et nous arrivions généralement en ayant grand faim.

La Taille de guêpe est un excellent établissement, d'après les notes et commentaires. Nous y sommes allés enthousiastes, mais en sommes ressortis déçus. Nous avions un point de comparaison, ayant mangé dans un restaurant du vieil Antibes la veille, et c'est probablement cela qui a conduit à notre déception. Sans ce point de comparaison, nous aurions mis 4/5 sans problème. Les assiettes sont généreuses, c'est bon, mais pour le prix, nous avons vraiment été déçus de la proposition :  peu d'élégance et de subtilité dans les saveurs. Les produits de bases sont bons mais il n'y a pas suffisamment de travail sur nos assiettes (style filet de boeuf, une bonne viande et bien cuite, mais le travail dans l'assiette n'était pas satisfaisant) (des goûts, textures..) au regard du prix de la carte.
Nous avons testés plusieurs entrées, des croquettes de fromage (dans lesquelles nous n'avons pas du tout senti le citron vert mentionné dans l'énoncé) , le foie gras, la soupe de potiron (avec une grosse cuillère de mascarpone dedans, c'était un peu "grossier" et pas appétissant. La veille dans un établissement concurrent avec un menu au même prix,  nous avions eu une soupe de potiron aussi, mais avec des châtaignes, un espuma de Boursin etc... c'était travaillé) Le cuisinier était seul en cuisine, ce qui explique peut être notre mauvaise expérience... nous avions par exemple commandé toutes les entrées ensemble mais certaines ont été oubliées, il y a eu pas mal d'attente...
Notre déception concernait vraiment la proportion culinaire : La sauce du plat de viande n'était pas liée,  peu gouteuse, tandis que celle du steak de thon était trop présente,  chaque assiette donnant l'impression d'être déséquilibrée. Nous n'avons pas pris de dessert, car largement refroidi par nos expériences respectives tout au long du repas.  Nous avions trop d'attentes peut être, après avoir lu les commentaires et vu les notes. Finalement cela fait un bon restaurant pour des palais peu exigeants, en famille par exemple. Mais l'addition est un peu salée si vous y faites attention.
Enfin, nous avons peu apprécié la carte, mais aussi le lieu. Nous étions collés aux autres clients, il y avait beaucoup de bruit (et de la musique en fond il me semble ), ce n'était pas très confortable.
textTranslated:
You might see several of our reviews for other restaurants in Antibes: during our stay with my partner, we tried four different restaurants in Old Antibes from November 7th to 11th. We ate early in the morning at the hotel (brunch-style) and then went for a day of mountain biking to explore the surrounding area (L'Esterel, Aspremont, etc.). In the evenings, we took the opportunity to discover the best places in town. We're both active, and we usually arrived very hungry.

La Taille de Guêpe is an excellent establishment, according to the ratings and reviews. We went there with high hopes, but left disappointed. We had a point of comparison, having eaten at a restaurant in Old Antibes the day before, and that's probably what led to our disappointment. Without that point of comparison, we would have easily given it 4/5. The portions are generous, and the food is good, but for the price, we were really disappointed: the flavors lacked elegance and subtlety. The basic ingredients are good, but there wasn't enough effort put into the dishes (for example, the beef fillet was good quality and well-cooked, but the presentation wasn't satisfactory) (flavors, textures, etc.) considering the price. We tried several appetizers: cheese croquettes (in which we couldn't taste the lime mentioned in the description at all), foie gras, and pumpkin soup (with a large spoonful of mascarpone in it; it was rather heavy-handed and unappetizing. The day before, at a competitor's restaurant with a similarly priced menu, we had pumpkin soup, but with chestnuts, a Boursin espuma, etc.—it was much more sophisticated). The chef was alone in the kitchen, which perhaps explains our poor experience. For example, we ordered all the appetizers together, but some were forgotten, and there was quite a wait. Our disappointment really stemmed from the proportions of the food: the sauce for the meat dish was thin and bland, while the sauce for the tuna steak was overpowering, making each plate seem unbalanced. We didn't order dessert, as we were thoroughly put off by our respective experiences throughout the meal. Perhaps we had too high expectations after reading the reviews and seeing the ratings. Ultimately, it's a good restaurant for those with less demanding tastes, for example, a family meal. But the bill is a bit steep if you're paying attention.

Finally, we didn't particularly like the menu, nor the atmosphere. We were crammed in with other customers, it was very noisy (and there seemed to be music playing in the background), and it wasn't very comfortable.
title: La Taille de Guêpe

C’est sans aucun doute le meilleur repas que j’ai eu à Antibes.

En dessert, j’ai pris le brioche perdu, qui était lui aussi excellent — riche, parfaitement équilibré et idéal pour terminer le repas.

J’ai aussi appris que le chef est là depuis l’ouverture du restaurant, et ça se ressent vraiment dans la qualité et la maîtrise des plats.

Si j’avais découvert cet endroit au début de mon séjour, j’y serais venu tous les jours.

Je recommande vivement.
textTranslated:
What an incredible discovery! The atmosphere is fantastic, with excellent music that really enhances the experience, but the true star here is the food. I had the Black Angus steak with blue cheese cream, and it was honestly the best steak I've had in a long time—perfectly cooked and bursting with flavor. It truly impressed me. It was without a doubt the best meal I had in Antibes.

For dessert, I had the French toast, which was also excellent—rich, perfectly balanced, and the ideal way to end the meal.

I also learned that the chef has been there since the restaurant opened, and it really shows in the quality and skill of the dishes.

If I had discovered this place at the beginning of my trip, I would have come every day.

I highly recommend it.

textTranslated: A truly wonderful discovery with the tasting menu, featuring flavors that were both harmonious and unexpected. We opted for the wine pairing option and have no regrets. The service was impeccable from beginning to end!
title: Restaurant le Vauban

name: Pierre-Emmanuel Berger
text: Très belle table et abordable surtout le midi
textTranslated: A very nice and affordable restaurant, especially at lunchtime.
title: Restaurant le Vauban

name: Phil Denice
text:
Restaurant découvert par le bouche à oreille,  très bel établissement !
Le cadre magique dans le vieil Antibes.
L'accueil et le service parfait.
Le sommelier très à l'aise dans ces explications.
La cuisine exquise,  produits de qualité,  cuisson maîtrisée,  les goûts et les saveurs sont respectés.
Le menu dégustation avec accord mets et vin un régal.
Merci beaucoup pour cette excellente soirée. A bientôt
textTranslated:
A restaurant discovered through word of mouth, a truly beautiful establishment!
The setting is magical in Old Antibes.
The welcome and service were impeccable.
The sommelier was very knowledgeable and knowledgeable.
The cuisine was exquisite, with high-quality ingredients, perfectly cooked, and the flavors and aromas were beautifully balanced.
The tasting menu with wine pairings was a delight.
Thank you so much for this wonderful evening. See you soon!
title: Restaurant le Vauban

name: Laurent Farkas
text: Tout est parfait, à prix modéré,c est toujours très bon
textTranslated: Everything is perfect, at a moderate price, it's always very good.
title: Restaurant le Vauban

name: philippe lorenzini
text: Toujours un pur plaisir de passer un moment dans cet etablissement. Mercredi dernier midi, le menu du midi est simplement parfait, avec des combinaisons de saveurs excellentes. Service irreprochable, cuisine très réussie,  choix de vin au verre largement suffisant et bien conseillé. Une reference sur Antibes avec un rapport qualité/ prix rare dans le secteur. A bientôt
textTranslated: It's always a pure pleasure to spend time at this establishment. Last Wednesday at lunchtime, the set menu was simply perfect, with excellent flavor combinations. Impeccable service, superb cuisine, and a more than adequate and well-recommended selection of wines by the glass. A benchmark in Antibes with a quality/price ratio rarely found in the area. See you soon!
title: Restaurant le Vauban

name: Catherine Amard
text: Très belle découverte...nous nous sommes régalés!!
textTranslated: A wonderful discovery...we thoroughly enjoyed it!!
title: Restaurant le Vauban

name: Peter Littley
text:
Superb in every detail. Reservations well managed, welcomng staff, after 2 visits 'our table' was always there for us. Superb table service, warm and friendly just perfect.
Everything perfectly managed and the quality of food  just added to the wonderful experience.
Food, service and people were always perfection. Yes, we love this restaurant!  Merci beaucoup.
title: Restaurant le Vauban

name: Francis Guinard
text: Menu-dégustation pour ce dîner très agréable. Mariage des saveurs réussi. Dressage des assiettes soigné. Produits de très bonne qualité. Carte des vins séduisante avec des bouteilles pour tous les budgets. Sommelier de bon conseil. Equipe dynamique et souriante. Un peu de bruit lorsque toutes les tables sont occupées.
textTranslated: A tasting menu for this very enjoyable dinner. A successful marriage of flavors. Impeccable presentation of the dishes. Very high-quality ingredients. An appealing wine list with bottles for all budgets. A sommelier who offered excellent advice. A dynamic and friendly staff. A bit noisy when all the tables are occupied.
title: Restaurant le Vauban

name: LUDOVIC LEROUX

Je recommande les yeux fermés

What a restaurant!!

I love this place.
Excellent value for money.
Impeccable service, worthy of a fine dining establishment.
I highly recommend it.

text: I would definitely like to visit again. Restaurant with table cloth and little surprises between courses - excellent service and value.

name: Christelle Bouvattier

name: Juliams
text: Sehr gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis👌 Die Speisen sind sehr schön angerichtet, geschmackvoll und auf den Punkt zubereitet. Zu dem Menü gibt es noch Kleinigkeiten vor und nach den Gängen gereicht, wie eine tolle Mousse oder kleine Küchlein. Man sitzt in einem sehr gediegenem Raum und wird freundlich bedient.
textTranslated: Excellent value for money! 👌 The dishes are beautifully presented, flavorful, and cooked to perfection. The menu also includes small bites before and after each course, such as a delicious mousse or small cakes. The dining room is very elegant, and the service is friendly.

name: Grazia Fontana

Une belle expérience réussie autour d’un menu juste parfait . Le service est attentionné , l ambiance idéale pout profiter d’un moment entre amis.
Un sans faute !
textTranslated: A wonderful and successful experience centered around a truly perfect menu. The service was attentive, and the atmosphere ideal for enjoying time with friends. Flawless!

Prezzi corretti,
Sempre un piacere essere vostri ospiti,,grazie, à presto

Affordable prices.
Always a pleasure to be your guests. Thank you. See you soon.

name: shuangzhu zhao
text:
中国人不骗中国人
非常好吃，餐前面包提供的居然不是黄油而是橄榄油加醋，这个醋巨好吃（本人吃醋专家，没在法国吃过这么好吃的醋），鱼非常新鲜，但是煎鱼其实看不出来很大的功夫的（不过我本来想吃烤鱼点错了点成了煎鱼，推荐试一下烤多宝鱼，土豆皮烤多宝鱼听起来是很有趣的菜
想吃别的来着但是很可惜后来没机会再来了
总之就是推荐
textTranslated:
Chinese people don't lie to Chinese people.

It was delicious! Surprisingly, the bread served before the meal wasn't with butter, but with olive oil and vinegar. This vinegar was incredibly delicious (I'm a vinegar expert, and I've never had such good vinegar in France). The fish was very fresh, but you can't really tell how much skill is involved in frying it (although I originally wanted grilled fish but mistakenly ordered fried fish). I recommend trying the grilled turbot; grilled turbot with potato skins sounds like a very interesting dish.

I wanted to try something else, but unfortunately, I didn't have a chance to come back.

In short, I recommend it.
responseFromOwnerText: Grazie mille 😊
title: Il Tinello

name: Daniele Angeli
responseFromOwnerText: Grazie mille ☺️
title: Il Tinello

name: Pascal ABRAHAM
text:
Habitués de ce restaurant à chaque vacances, il tinello est une véritable pépite du bord de mer de Juan les Pins.
Les pâtes au homard, le fritto misto, le baba au limoncello sont quelques uns des classiques dont nous ne nous lassons pas.
Accueil et service parfait ❤️
Le meilleur restaurant italien du secteur.
Ne changez rien tout est parfait !
textTranslated:
Regulars at this restaurant every holiday, Il Tinello is a true gem on the Juan-les-Pins seafront.
The lobster pasta, the fritto misto, and the limoncello baba are just a few of the classics we never tire of. The welcome and service are impeccable ❤️
The best Italian restaurant in the area. Don't change a thing, everything is perfect!
responseFromOwnerText: Grazie mille ☺️

Looking at the menu, there are many other dishes I'd like to try, but I can't eat them all. If possible, I suggest making a reservation in advance. PhT

name: Вита Левковская
text: Прочитала отзывы, поверила рейтингу и получили полное неудовлетворение после посещения ресторана. Осьминог оказался безвкусный и жесткий. Десерт из груши с кофе- кремом разочаровал. Но при этом ценник выше , чем в соседних ресторанах.После того , как сказали хозяйке, что осьминог не вкусный, она развернулась и ушла и вся ее приветливость ушла следом за ней. Очень неприятно.
textTranslated: I read the reviews, believed the rating and was completely dissatisfied after visiting the restaurant. The octopus was tasteless and tough. The pear dessert with coffee cream was disappointing. But the price tag is higher than in neighboring restaurants. After we told the hostess that the octopus was not tasty, she turned around and left and all her friendliness left after her. Very unpleasant.
title: Restaurant Le J

name: Olivier Bouvet
text:
Nous revenons toujours avec un immense plaisir. Non seulement la cuisine est excellente mais le service et l’accueil sont exceptionnels.
Je recommande très vivement cet établissement qui est ce qui se fait de mieux sur le secteur.
Merci pour votre gentillesse et générosité.
textTranslated:
We always return with immense pleasure. Not only is the food excellent, but the service and welcome are exceptional.

I highly recommend this establishment, which is the best in the area.

Thank you for your kindness and generosity.

name: jeff lee
text: I would give this restaurant 6 stars if I could! Wonderful dining experience for our only dinner in Antibes.   The staff and owners are extremely friendly and really make you feel at home at their establishment.  Every interaction was a delight and the food is delicious!   I highly recon this place for anyone visiting Antibes or France for that matter.  I will be back anytime after m in the vicinity.  Thanks again for the wonderful experience!

textTranslated: During my vacation in Juan-les-Pins, I went there several times. Honestly, it's a place I highly recommend. Everything is perfect, the food is delicious, and the two ladies who served me were lovely and professional. Don't hesitate, go for it!

name: Jonathan & Cathy Sharpe
text:
La Trattoria is a hidden gem in Antibes that specialises in Italian cuisine and is tucked away on Louis Pasteur and worth checking out.

Their Mozzarella di Bufala and the Camembert di Buffalo au Miel is served on Focaccia is its heavenly.

The Pouple (Octopus) Grille a la Sicilienne is out of this world.

Today we had the Cote de Boeuf with foie gras and it too was excellent.

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

title: La Trattoria

name: Juliams
text: Immer wieder ein Genuss! Man sollte jedoch mit genügend Appetit kommen, da die Portionen sehr ausreichend sind. Wir sind dazu gekommen, uns die Vorspeise hier zu teilen, damit man die Hauptspeise schafft. Ich kann die Pasta di Mare absolut empfehlen. Die Meeresfrüchte sind super frisch, die Sauce super aromatisch und mit der selbstgemachten Pasta ein Genuss! Ein absolutes Highlight ist auch der Lardo, der auf dem frischen lauwarmen Brot dahinschmelzt. Das hausgemachte Tiramisu rundet das Essen ab. Die Weinauswahl ist sehr gut. Der Service ist äußerst herzlich!
textTranslated: Always a delight! You should come with a good appetite, though, as the portions are very generous. We ended up sharing the starter so we could manage the main course. I can absolutely recommend the Pasta di Mare. The seafood is incredibly fresh, the sauce wonderfully aromatic, and with the homemade pasta, it's simply divine! The lardo is also a real highlight, melting perfectly on the fresh, warm bread. The homemade tiramisu is the perfect finishing touch. The wine selection is excellent. The service is exceptionally warm and welcoming!
title: La Trattoria

name: rufan zhang
text: 非常喜欢这里的氛围和食物！我点了烤章鱼和panna cotta，很美味。两位店员也很热情，让我感觉仿佛回到了意大利。她们还给我推荐了很不错的开胃酒（忘记名字了，似乎是一种白葡萄酒，酸酸甜甜的）。在结束用餐前我还外带了一个提拉米苏当作回去后的夜宵，跟我的同伴一起分享，现在很后悔只外带了一个，因为实在太好吃了....下次再来Antibes的话，一定会继续来这家店的！
textTranslated: I absolutely loved the atmosphere and the food! I ordered grilled octopus and panna cotta, both delicious. The two staff members were also very welcoming, making me feel like I was back in Italy. They even recommended a great aperitif (I forgot the name, but it seemed to be a white wine, sweet and sour). Before leaving, I took a tiramisu home for a late-night snack to share with my companion. Now I regret only taking one, because it was so delicious... If I'm ever in Antibes again, I'll definitely come back to this restaurant!

title: Romagna Mia

name: Juline Grosjean
text:
UNE PANNA COTTA SEXY = UN COMMENTAIRE SEXY
Nous nous sommes présentés un peu par hasard  un samedi soir dans cet établissement italien qui ne paie pas de mine de l'extérieur. Au regard de notre expérience, je suis étonnée que le restau n'affiche pas complet un samedi soir !
Si vous voulez passer une soirée conviviale et experientielle, sans vous prendre la tête, dans une ambiance chaleureuse, c'est l'endroit idéal !
La serveuse et gérante de l'établissement avec son mari est un vrai personnage qui est fière de servir ce que celui-ci cuisine de l'autre côté du mur...mais pas si loin finalement : il vient dire bonjour, finir la présentation des plats à table quand il le peut et échanger en fin de repas pour connaître l'avis de ses clients. Le service est détonnant mais passionné, avec la volonté de donner le meilleur à chaque client. Le service de ma pana cotta sexy restera gravé dans ma mémoire de nombreuses années... si je ne reviens pas avant pour qu'on m'en serve une nouvelle, parce que la recette est terrible et les cerises sont excellentes !!!!
En effet, j'en oublierais presque de parler de la qualité des plats : pâtes faites maisons cuites parfaitement, produits venu tout droit d'Italie présentés au moment de la prise de commande (truffe), desserts que tout le monde s'arrache ! Un perfect match !
Une expérience qui marquera ce week-end entre copains. Une adresse qui deviendrait mon QG si j'étais de la région, puisqu'elle m'a fait voyager en Italie le temps d'une soiree. Au plaisir de se revoir et manger à nouveau à votre table !
textTranslated:
A SEXY PANNA COTTA = A SEXY COMMENT
We stumbled upon this unassuming Italian restaurant one Saturday night. Given our experience, I'm surprised it wasn't packed on a Saturday!

If you're looking for a relaxed and enjoyable evening in a warm atmosphere, this is the perfect place! The waitress and manager, along with her husband, are real characters who take pride in serving what he cooks on the other side of the wall... but not so far away after all: he comes to say hello, finishes plating the dishes at the table when he can, and chats with his customers at the end of the meal to get their feedback. The service is exceptional yet passionate, with a genuine desire to give each customer the very best. The service of my sexy panna cotta will be etched in my memory for years to come... if I don't come back before then for another one, because the recipe is amazing and the cherries are excellent!

In fact, I almost forgot to mention the quality of the other dishes: perfectly cooked homemade pasta, products imported directly from Italy presented when we ordered (truffles), and desserts that everyone raves about! A perfect match!
An experience that will be a highlight of this weekend with friends. This place would become my go-to spot if I lived in the area, since it transported me to Italy for an evening. Looking forward to seeing you again and dining at your table once more!

name: Francesca Salsi
text:
Sono rimasta piacevolmente sorpresa dalla gestione familiare di 2 fantastiche persone marito e moglie molto umili gentili e premurosi.
Non ha tantissimi piatti ma quelli in menù sono abbondanti e molto curati.
Ottima qualità prezzo.
Lo consiglio a chi è in zona niente a vedere con tutti i ristoranti commerciali nei paraggi.

It doesn't have a huge selection of dishes, but the ones on the menu are plentiful and very carefully prepared.
Excellent value for money.
I recommend it to anyone in the area; it's nothing like all the commercial restaurants nearby.
title: Casa Gi

name: Martina Roth
text:
Che bella sorpresa!

In una grigia giornata di febbraio ci siamo fermati qui a pranzo, io e mio marito insieme ai miei genitori, in visita dall’Italia. Cercavamo qualcosa di buono e casereccio, con un’atmosfera accogliente e senza troppi fronzoli: Casa Gi ha centrato perfettamente l’obiettivo.

I proprietari sono stati eccezionali, ci hanno accolti come se fossimo a casa loro, sempre attenti e disponibili ma mai invadenti. Il cibo era davvero incredibile: pesce tenerissimo, contorni ben bilanciati e saporiti… e i dolci meritano una menzione speciale (consiglio vivamente la tarte tatin!).

Il locale è piccolo, quindi conviene prenotare con un po’ di anticipo, ma se cercate un posto autentico e genuino, questo fa decisamente al caso vostro.
textTranslated:
What a lovely surprise!

On a gray February day, my husband and I stopped here for lunch, along with my parents, who were visiting from Italy. We were looking for something delicious and homey, with a welcoming, no-frills atmosphere: Casa Gi hit the spot perfectly.

The owners were exceptional; they welcomed us as if we were at home, always attentive and helpful but never intrusive. The food was truly incredible: tender fish, well-balanced and flavorful sides... and the desserts deserve a special mention (I highly recommend the tarte tatin!).

The place is small, so it's best to book well in advance, but if you're looking for authentic and genuine dining, this is definitely the place for you.
title: Casa Gi

text: Dans un ambiance familiale où tout est fait maison avec un prix raisonnable. On adore 🫶 merci

name: Christiane Garrant
text: Pour fêter cette fin d'année, les bénévoles du service de l'alimentaire de la Croix Rouge à Antibes ont décidé de partager un repas. Nous avons choisi le Casa Gi pour sa situation au centre du vieil Antibes et pour les retours positifs que nous avions eus. Et nous avons passé un très bon moment et avons très bien mangé avec des produits frais et cuisinés avec amour par la "patronne".  Nous avons reçu un accueil chaleureux et tout le monde a été ravi dans ce cadre familial.  Je recommande à 100% ce petit restaurant et vous conseille de réserver car il n'y a pas beaucoup de place.
textTranslated: To celebrate the end of the year, the volunteers from the Red Cross food service in Antibes decided to share a meal. We chose Casa Gi because of its location in the heart of Old Antibes and the positive reviews we had received. We had a wonderful time and enjoyed a delicious meal of fresh, lovingly prepared ingredients. We received a warm welcome, and everyone was delighted in this friendly, family atmosphere. I wholeheartedly recommend this little restaurant and advise you to make a reservation as seating is limited.

name: Andy
text:
Wir waren in diesem Restaurant, um Burger zu essen und es war eine absolute Enttäuschung. Die Besitzer sind ausgesprochen unfreundlich und wirken, als wären Gäste eher eine Last als willkommen. Der Burger war gerade noch okay, aber die Portion Pommes für zusätzliche 4 Euro war winzig! Noch schlimmer: Das Mayo und Ketchup waren abgelaufen , völlig inakzeptabel!

Als wir das Restaurant verliessen, vergassen wir leider eine Einkaufstasche mit Souvenirs. Nur 10 Minuten später kamen wir zurück, um sie zu holen und der Sack war bereits im Müll, zusammen mit Essensresten. Der Besitzer tat so, als sei das völlig normal, und überreichte uns die Tüte mitsamt dem Abfall!

So ein Verhalten ist einfach respektlos. Absolut nicht empfehlenswert!
textTranslated:
We went to this restaurant to have burgers, and it was a complete disappointment. The owners are extremely unfriendly and seem like customers are more of a burden than welcome. The burger was just about okay, but the portion of fries for an additional €4 was tiny! Even worse: the mayo and ketchup were expired, completely unacceptable!

Unfortunately, when we left the restaurant, we forgot a shopping bag full of souvenirs. Just 10 minutes later, we came back to get it, and the bag was already in the trash, along with leftover food. The owner acted like this was perfectly normal and handed us the bag along with the trash!

This kind of behavior is simply disrespectful. Absolutely not recommended!

name: Jan Kenber
text: Wir waren zum Mittagessen hier und wurden bereits beim Empfang unhöflich behandelt. Das Essen war zwar in Ordnung, aber die Saucen wirkten verdorben, da sie Stückchen enthielten. Als wir beim Gehen unsere  durchsichtige Tüte mit gekauften Souvenirs vergaßen und kurz zurückkehrten, wurde es noch schlimmer: Man holte unsere Sachen direkt aus dem Mülleimer in der Küche und gab sie uns so zurück. Für uns ein absolut inakzeptables und respektloses Erlebnis.
textTranslated: We were here for lunch and were treated rudely right from the start. The food was okay, but the sauces seemed spoiled, as they contained bits of food. When we left, forgetting our clear bag of souvenirs and briefly returning, things got even worse: Our things were taken directly from the kitchen trash can and returned to us like that. A completely unacceptable and disrespectful experience for us.

title: Ti Toques

name: Matthieu PREVOT
text:
Une très belle découverte que ce Ti Toques ! Dans un cadre calme et chaleureux, loin de l'agitation du bord de mer, on se sent immédiatement à l'aise. Le service est agréable et attentionné, sans jamais être envahissant.

La cuisine est généreuse, savoureuse, et visiblement préparée avec des produits frais de qualité — ça se sent dans l'assiette. Un vrai rapport qualité-prix, à mille lieues des attrape-touristes qui longent le front de mer.

Une adresse sincère que je recommande sans hésiter, à faire et à refaire !
textTranslated:
Ti Toques was a wonderful discovery! In a calm and welcoming setting, far from the hustle and bustle of the seafront, you immediately feel at ease. The service is pleasant and attentive, without ever being intrusive.

The cuisine is generous, flavorful, and clearly prepared with fresh, high-quality ingredients—you can taste it on the plate. It offers excellent value for money, a world away from the tourist traps lining the seafront.

A truly authentic place that I wholeheartedly recommend—a must-try!
title: Ti Toques

name: FR costruzioni
text:
Locale incantevole...atmosfera meravigliosa la cucina è ricercata e curata...
Consiglio...
textTranslated:
Enchanting place... wonderful atmosphere, refined and carefully prepared cuisine...
I recommend...
title: Ti Toques

name: Alexis Cahen
text:
Ce restaurant formidable est devenu ma petite cantine lorsque j'ai des amis de passage qui viennent dans la région : 100% repartent ravis!

Il est en effet très rare aujourd'hui de pouvoir proposer à Juan Les Pins un menu gourmet à moins de 50€ par personne, avec des produits de grande qualité.

Le service est également très agréable, mes félicitations au chef !
textTranslated:
This fantastic restaurant has become my go-to spot whenever friends visit the area: 100% of them leave delighted!

It's truly rare these days to find a gourmet menu in Juan-les-Pins for under €50 per person, featuring such high-quality ingredients.

The service is also excellent; my congratulations to the chef!
title: Ti Toques

name: E&D
text:
Se vi trovate ad Antibes o Juan-Les-Pins non potete non fare una piacevole tappa presso questo ristorante tipico francese nel centro di Juan-Les-Pins .
L'ambiente è molto caldo, accogliente e i proprietari molto gentili e scrupolosi. La cameriera parlava anche un po' di italiano, oltre che francese e inglese, questo ci ha permesso di capirci in maniera fluida e senza intoppi. Ho avuto il piacere di gustare il piatto "Poulpe et burrata fumés au bois d'olivier" che è un piatto d'autore dello chef 🎨
Mentre il mio fidanzato ha scelto di assaporare il famoso fois gras francese prendendo come piatto "Filet de boeuf Rossi avce fois gras frasi poelé", rimasti entrambi pienamente soddisfatti. Ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo.
Consigliatissimo!!
textTranslated:
If you find yourself in Antibes or Juan-Les-Pins, you can't miss a pleasant stop at this typical French restaurant in the center of Juan-Les-Pins.
The atmosphere is very warm and welcoming, and the owners are very kind and attentive. The waitress also spoke a little Italian, as well as French and English, which allowed us to understand each other fluently and without any problems. I had the pleasure of tasting the "Poulpe et burrata fumés au bois d'olivier," a signature dish from the chef 🎨
While my boyfriend chose to savor the famous French foie gras, ordering the "Filet de boeuf Rossi avce foie gras frais poelé," they were both completely satisfied. Excellent value for money.
Highly recommended!!

reviewContext.Parking options: Free parking lot, Paid parking lot, Free street parking, Paid street parking

name: Ledos Marion
text: Très bon établissement, cuisine exceptionnelle avec un staff aux petits soins nous avons même eu la visite du chef à table. On recommande !
textTranslated: Excellent establishment, exceptional cuisine with attentive staff; we even had a visit from the chef at our table. Highly recommended!
title: Ti Toques

name: céline Marin
text:
Un véritable bijou. Chaque plat est une explosion de saveurs, à la fois raffiné et réconfortant. La soupe de poisson inoubliable en entrée, a été gentiment partagée en 2 portions pour pouvoir garder une place pour le dessert… et heureusement. La brioche perdue, secret du chef (comme son digestif) sont un pur délice et méritent à eux seuls le détour.
Le service attentionné et réactif rend l’expérience encore plus chaleureuse. Si nous n’étions pas restés seulement 3 jours, nous y serions revenus encore et encore...
textTranslated:
A true gem. Each dish is an explosion of flavors, both refined and comforting. The unforgettable fish soup starter was kindly divided into two portions so that we could leave room for dessert... and thankfully so. The French toast, the chef's secret (like his digestif), is a pure delight and worth the detour alone.
The attentive and responsive service makes the experience even more memorable. If we hadn't stayed only three days, we would have returned again and again...
title: Ti Toques

name: Si Si
text: Piccolo ristorante francese, il servizio è gentile e curato e il cibo è ottimo. Abbiamo mangiato un tortino di formaggio di capra e miele, una paella di gamberoni e capesante e un filetto di carne al tartufo, tutto squisito. Oltre al menù alla carta hanno sempre dei piatti del giorno. Super consigliato!
textTranslated: This small French restaurant offers friendly and attentive service, and the food is excellent. We had a goat cheese and honey tart, a prawn and scallop paella, and a truffle-filled beef fillet—all delicious. In addition to the à la carte menu, they always have specials of the day. Highly recommended!
title: Ti Toques

name: Marco Zimmermann
text: Un dîner absolument sensationnel avec un menu gastronomique raffiné et un service très chaleureux. Une adresse que je recommande vivement !

title: Pasta e Basta - Antibes

name: I D
text:
Charmant petit restaurant niché au cœur de la vieille ville d’Antibes, où l’on comprend vite que “petite carte” rime avec “grande qualité” ! Ici, pas besoin de 12 pages de menu : quelques plats suffisent pour garantir des produits frais et savoureux… et franchement, on ne s’en plaint pas 😄

Le service ? Rapide, efficace et surtout plein de charme ! Mention spéciale à Ciro, aussi professionnel que sympathique, dont le délicieux accent italien ajoute une touche de soleil supplémentaire à l’expérience. On s’est laissés guider… et on a bien fait !

Résultat : un vrai régal du début à la fin. Une adresse qui donne envie de revenir — et pas seulement pour travailler son accent italien !
textTranslated:
A charming little restaurant nestled in the heart of Antibes' old town, where you quickly realize that "small menu" rhymes with "high quality"! Here, there's no need for a 12-page menu: a few dishes are enough to guarantee fresh and flavorful ingredients… and frankly, we're not complaining 😄

The service? Fast, efficient, and above all, charming! Special mention to Ciro, as professional as he is friendly, whose delightful Italian accent adds an extra touch of sunshine to the experience. We let ourselves be guided… and we're so glad we did!

The result: a true delight from start to finish. A place that makes you want to come back—and not just to practice your Italian accent!
responseFromOwnerText: Grazie! Bellissime parole! A presto ✨🤌🏻🍝
title: Pasta e Basta - Antibes

text: Ottimo ristorante se vi trovate in zona! Cibo autentico italiano, con bei piattoni di pasta serviti direttamente in padella. Il locale molto carino e lo staff cordiale e tranquillo. Ci hanno fatto entrare anche il cane senza problemi. Consigliato.
textTranslated: Excellent restaurant if you're in the area! Authentic Italian food, with delicious plates of pasta served straight from the pan. The place is very cute, and the staff is friendly and relaxed. They even let our dog in without a problem. Recommended.
responseFromOwnerText: Grazie mille 🤩 🍝🤌🏻 peccato le 4 stelle…. 😩

name: Fazerman 1000
text:
Première pour nous dans se restaurant italien
Nous étions 4 très bon
Une entrée à partager
Pâtes aux calamars
Pâtes aux poivre
2 tiramisu
3 café
Pas de boisson
137€ je trouve un peu chère
textTranslated:
First time at this Italian restaurant.
There were four of us, very good.
One appetizer to share.
Pasta with calamari.
Pasta with pepper sauce.
Two tiramisu.
Three coffees.
No drinks.
€137, I find a bit expensive.
responseFromOwnerText:
Bonjour,
Merci beaucoup pour votre visite et pour votre retour positif sur nos plats – cela nous fait vraiment plaisir.
Nous nous permettons simplement d’apporter quelques précisions concernant le prix final :
👉 Les “pâtes aux calamars” sont en réalité une Puttanesca de calamars, préparée avec tomates, olives, câpres, ail, persil et calamars frais — une recette travaillée et généreuse.
👉 Les “pâtes au poivre” correspondent à notre Cacio e Pepe, un plat traditionnel romain et véritable pilier de la cuisine italienne, réalisé avec Pecorino Romano DOP et poivre fraîchement moulu.
Pour votre table de 4, nous avons servi 700 g de pâtes fraîches, soit 35 € par personne, un dimanche midi à Antibes — l’une des villes les plus chères de la Côte d’Azur — en utilisant des produits de grande qualité et des recettes préparées avec soin.
Nous pensons ainsi que le tarif reste cohérent avec la qualité des ingrédients, le travail derrière chaque plat et notre localisation.
Merci encore pour vos commentaires, nous serons ravis de vous accueillir à nouveau pour confirmer ces belles impressions.
title: Pasta e Basta - Antibes

Sono stata da Pasta e Basta e ne sono rimasta davvero entusiasta! È un ristorante italiano gestito da Federico e Ciro, due ragazzi giovani, volenterosi e con una passione pazzesca per quello che fanno.
La cucina è veramente italiana, buonissima e di grande qualità: si sente l’attenzione per gli ingredienti e per la tradizione. È sempre un piacere trovare posti così, dove si mangia bene e si percepisce tutto l’impegno e l’amore che mettono nel loro lavoro.
Bravissimi ragazzi, continuate così! Consigliatissimo. 🇮🇹✨
textTranslated:
I've been to Pasta e Basta and I was absolutely thrilled! It's an Italian restaurant run by Federico and Ciro, two young, enthusiastic guys with an incredible passion for what they do.
The cuisine is truly Italian, delicious, and of the highest quality: you can taste the attention to ingredients and tradition. It's always a pleasure to find places like this, where you eat well and you can feel all the commitment and love they put into their work.
Well done guys, keep it up! Highly recommended. 🇮🇹✨

text:

Dommage, car l’expérience aurait pu être bien meilleure.
textTranslated:
Overall, a pleasant stay: clean, comfortable room, well located with a lovely balcony overlooking the sea.

However, I was disappointed by the hotel restaurant: the waiter was unpleasant, the €22 mussels were meagerly portioned, and the chicken pasta the next day made me sick during the night.

It's a shame, because the experience could have been much better.

Quand vient la note nous voyons que la côte est à 110€.
C'est normal que le prix de la côte dépende de son poids, mais personne ne nous a averti que le prix allait plus que doubler, et personne ne nous  averti
Nous avons donc eu une mauvaise surprise au moment de la note
textTranslated:
We went to Le Fricot; overall the setting is nice, but the prices are very high (generally the case on the French Riviera).
However, we ordered a rib of beef to share, listed at €49.
When the bill arrived, we saw that the rib was €110.
It's normal for the price of the rib to depend on its weight, but no one warned us that the price would more than double.
So we had a nasty surprise when the bill arrived.
responseFromOwnerText:
Bonjour
Je trouve réellement votre notation injuste 
Je vous ai dit ce soir la que j’avais uniquement la côte de bœuf au poids et que je vous est coupé 1,1kg 
Soit 10€ les 100g pour un viande qui coute 60 à 70€ le kg chez le boucher …
Quel voleur je suis de vous cuisiner et servir à table pour autant de marge …
A la fin du repas je vous ai même rendu 20€ car j’ai remarqué votre incompréhension et que votre jeunesse m’a touché 
Trop bon trop …
Sur ce je vous souhaite une bonne journée

name: Romy
text:
Déçus suite à notre visite, et une expérience qui reflète celle de commentaires négatifs déjà postés.

Nous avions réservés et à notre arrivée, à l'heure, notre table n'était pas prête, pas d'explication. Une fois assis, 15/20mins pour prendre notre commande (juste pour les boissons), on nous donne enfin le menu vers 21h25, le serveur déclarant: jusqu'ici on nous a délaissé mais je reviens dans 2minutes. Pas d'excuse bien que conscient que le service reçu est très moyen jusqu'ici.

Plus tard, en nous amenant l'entrée notre serveur vérifiant qu'elle est bien pour nous nous lâche : "ah je suis fatigué, qu'est-ce que je suis fatigué moi"..
Je travaille moi même en salle en restauration et même après un service continu de 10 heures je ne permettrais pas un tel commentaire à des clients. J'ai trouvé ça déplacé et peu professionel, d'autant plus que bien que 'très fatigué' il n'avait aucun problème pour amuser la galerie et donner une super service à la table d'à côté à chaque opportunité possible.

Du côté cuisine, notre entrée était moyenne mais nous avons beaucoup aimé les plats.

Nous avons quand même laissé un tip car nous apprécions la nature pénible de cette profession et nos plats principaux ainsi que le vin était très bon, mais le service laissait clairement à désirer.

À ce niveau de prix là, si on ne peut se permettre d'assurer un service au moins décent pour chaque table, il faut peut-être repensé les choses (moins de table, une cuisine qui ferme plus tôt, un employé en plus, etc..).
Cette expérience m'a laissé une impression de personnes ayant décidé d'ouvrir un restaurant sans expérience préalable et qui sont maintenant dépassées par les réalités de ce travail. Je me trompe potentiellement totalement, mais il serait encore plus choquant que de donner un service aussi médiocre quand on sait ce qu'on fait.
textTranslated:
Disappointed after our visit, and an experience that reflects the negative reviews already posted.

We had a reservation and upon arrival, on time, our table wasn't ready, with no explanation. Once seated, it took 15-20 minutes to take our order (just for drinks). We were finally given the menu around 9:25 PM, with the waiter saying, "We've been neglected so far, but I'll be back in two minutes." No apology was offered, despite being aware that the service we'd received had been very poor up to that point.

Later, while bringing us our appetizers, our waiter, checking that they were indeed for us, exclaimed, "Oh, I'm tired, I'm so tired!" I myself work in the restaurant industry, and even after a 10-hour shift, I wouldn't allow such a comment to be made to customers. I found it inappropriate and unprofessional, especially since, despite being 'very tired,' he had no problem entertaining the other diners and providing excellent service to the next table at every opportunity.

As for the food, our starter was average, but we really enjoyed the main courses.

We still left a tip because we appreciate the demanding nature of this profession, and our main courses and the wine were very good, but the service clearly left much to be desired.

At this price point, if you can't afford to provide at least decent service to every table, perhaps you need to rethink things (fewer tables, an earlier kitchen closing time, an additional employee, etc.).
This experience left me with the impression of people who decided to open a restaurant without any prior experience and who are now overwhelmed by the realities of the job. I could be completely wrong, but it would be even more shocking to provide such mediocre service when you know what you're doing.
responseFromOwnerText:
Bonjour
Je vous remercie beaucoup de ce commentaire
Je suis désolé pour ce qu’il s’est passé.
Auriez vous la gentillesse de me dire quand êtes vous venus ? Et ce que vous avez mangé 
Je vais créer une ouverture de compte chez pôle emploi … 7h mise en place et service compris … je ne comprends pas cette fatigue pour un me salle à gérer à deux sans trop de stress en plus et je parle en connaissance de cause

Autre geste très sympathique , ma petite fille a reçu des crayons pour colorier directement sur le dos des menus ou il y avait des dessins. Une délicate attention pour les familles.
l'ambiance est au top +, le service est fluide et professionnel. Le petit plus pratique c'est le qr code sur la table qui permet de payer directement dans avoir à faire la queue à la caisse.  bref une très belle  découverte à antibes. Dommage qu'on habite loin, si on repasse dans le coin, nous reviendrons avec plaisir.
textTranslated:
Excellent experience at Bistro & Co.

The welcome was truly perfect; the entire team was smiling, pleasant, and very attentive. The food was excellent, the portions were generous, and the service was quick, which was much appreciated.
We were seated on the sunny terrace, and without even asking, they kindly offered us straw hats to take home (too bad I forgot mine!). A truly thoughtful touch!
Another very nice gesture was that my little girl received crayons to color directly on the back of the menus, which had pictures on them. A thoughtful touch for families.

The atmosphere is fantastic, and the service is smooth and professional. A handy little extra is the QR code on the table, which allows you to pay directly without having to queue at the till. In short, a wonderful discovery in Antibes. It's a shame we live so far away; if we're ever in the area again, we'll gladly return.

name: Nicolas G.
text:
Absolutely fantastic experience at Mama Boon. From the moment we walked in, the atmosphere felt warm and welcoming, and the service was genuinely attentive without being overbearing.

The food is where this place truly shines. Every dish was incredibly fresh, full of flavor, and clearly made with care. The balance of herbs, spices, and textures was spot on—authentic Vietnamese cuisine done right. The nems were especially outstanding—crispy, flavorful, and easily some of the best I’ve had.

What really stood out was the consistency across everything we ordered. Whether it was the main dishes or the sides, each plate delivered both in taste and presentation. Portions were generous, and the pricing felt more than fair for the quality you get.

If you're looking for a Vietnamese restaurant that combines excellent food, friendly service, and great value, Mama Boon is an easy recommendation. I’ll definitely be coming back.
responseFromOwnerText:
Merci beaucoup Nicolas pour ce magnifique retour et pour vos 5 étoiles.
Nous sommes très touchés par vos mots sur MamaBoon Antibes.
Nous sommes ravis que vous ayez apprécié l’accueil, l’ambiance, le service ainsi que la qualité de notre cuisine vietnamienne à Antibes. Savoir que vous avez ressenti la fraîcheur des produits, le soin apporté à chaque assiette et l’équilibre des saveurs est une très belle récompense pour toute notre équipe.
Un grand merci également pour votre mention spéciale sur nos nems, cela nous fait particulièrement plaisir.
Nous avons à cœur de proposer à Antibes une cuisine vietnamienne authentique, généreuse et savoureuse, avec un excellent rapport qualité-prix, et votre retour nous encourage énormément.
Au plaisir de vous accueillir de nouveau très bientôt chez MamaBoon Antibes.
L’équipe MamaBoon

Tout cela sans sauce. Ignoble !

The pork: pieces of bacon (only fat) and the spring rolls were filled with sausage meat!
All this without sauce. Disgusting!
responseFromOwnerText:
Bonjour Maryse,

Nous sommes sincèrement désolés de lire que votre expérience n’a pas été satisfaisante.

Nos bo bun ne sont pas uniquement au porc : nous proposons habituellement plusieurs recettes (bœuf, poulet, végétarien…). Il est possible que, ce jour-là, certaines préparations aient été en rupture suite à l’affluence, mais ce n’est pas notre fonctionnement normal.

Concernant le porc, il s’agit de poitrine de porc choisie volontairement pour obtenir le croustillant traditionnel vietnamien, avec alternance de viande et de gras — ce n’est pas un défaut de qualité mais une recette authentique. Les nems sont également faits maison, élaborés à partir de porc fermier assaisonné, et non d’une simple chair industrielle.

Enfin, chaque bo bun est servi avec sa sauce nuoc-mâm maison. S’il en a manqué lors de votre commande, nous en sommes désolés : il ne faut surtout pas hésiter à nous le signaler immédiatement, nous aurions corrigé cela sur place.

Votre retour reste important pour nous. N’hésitez pas à nous contacter directement lors de votre prochaine visite afin que nous puissions vous proposer une expérience conforme à ce que nous souhaitons offrir.

— L’équipe MamaBoon

name: Eric Lassiaille
text:
🇬🇧 ENGLISH

La Pescheria – my favourite address after the market in Antibes.

A place that truly celebrates the sea – pure, honest and uncompromising.
An excellent price–quality ratio, exceptional freshness and an offer deliberately focused exclusively on seafood.

A true highlight is the oysters & wine offer:
freshly shucked oysters paired with a well-chosen glass of wine – simple, fairly priced and exactly how pleasure should be. No show, no excess, just the essentials.

La Pescheria consciously offers less choice, but delivers maximum quality. Everything is driven by daily freshness and the catch of the day: oysters, prawns, sea urchins, fish carpaccio – clear, precise and respectful of the product.

The young, dynamic team impresses with warmth, energy and genuine passion.
Space is limited and it is almost always full – but waiting is part of the experience and always worth it.

A special plus: you can also buy fresh fish and seafood to take home, selected with the same care as what is served at the tables.

This is not about quantity.
This is about quality, freshness and values.
A wonderful reminder that less is often more.

I wholeheartedly recommend everyone to plan a visit to La Pescheria.

Avec vous · Avec passion · Avec Éric

⸻

🇩🇪 DEUTSCH

La Pescheria – meine Lieblingsadresse nach dem Markt in Antibes.

Ein Ort, der das Meer feiert – pur, ehrlich und kompromisslos.
Ein hervorragendes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis, außergewöhnliche Frische und ein Angebot, das sich bewusst und ausschließlich den Meeresprodukten widmet.

Ein echtes Highlight ist das Austern-&-Wein-Angebot:
frisch geöffnete Austern, dazu ein gut ausgewähltes Glas Wein – unkompliziert, fair kalkuliert und genau so, wie Genuss sein sollte. Kein Chichi, kein Übermaß, nur das Wesentliche.

La Pescheria setzt bewusst auf weniger Auswahl, dafür auf maximale Qualität. Alles richtet sich nach der Tagesfrische und dem Fang: Austern, Garnelen, Seeigel, Fisch-Carpaccio – klar, präzise, respektvoll gegenüber dem Produkt.

Das junge, dynamische Team überzeugt mit Herzlichkeit, Energie und echter Leidenschaft.
Der Platz ist begrenzt, es ist fast immer voll – doch das Warten gehört dazu und lohnt sich jedes Mal.

Besonders schön: Man kann hier auch frischen Fisch und Meeresfrüchte zum Mitnehmen kaufen, mit derselben Sorgfalt ausgewählt wie das, was an den Tischen serviert wird.

Hier geht es nicht um Masse.
Hier geht es um Qualität, Frische und Haltung.
Ein wunderbares Beispiel dafür, dass weniger oft mehr ist.

Ich empfehle wirklich jedem, einen Besuch bei La Pescheria fest einzuplanen.

Avec vous · Avec passion · Avec Éric
