text: Ein Zufallsfund beim Schlendern durch die Markthalle. Frische Fischgerichte und Meeresfrüchte direkt beim Fischhändler. Authentisch, urig und ein flotter freundlicher Service. Von dort lässt sich gut das bunte Treiben in der offenen Markthalle beobachten und genißen. Wir wollten eigentlich nicht zu Mittag essen, sondern nur ein paar Austern genießen. Daraus wurde jedoch eine ausgedehnte Degustation von Austern, Gambas und Doraden-Carpaccio. Alles eine Empfehlung wert, insbesondere jedoch die hauchdünn geschnittenen Doradenfilets (roh, nur als Hinweis, aber sehr köstlich). Wir haben insgesamt 24 Austern, 6 Gambas und einen Teller Dorade verzehrt, dazu Brot und eine Flasche Wein. Selbst als Meeresfrüchte-Gericht schon ein üppiges Mittagessen. Aus unserer Sicht eine besondere Empfehlung.
textTranslated: A chance discovery while strolling through the market hall. Fresh fish dishes and seafood directly from the fishmonger. Authentic, quaint, and with fast, friendly service. From there, you can easily observe and enjoy the hustle and bustle of the open market hall. We didn't actually want to have lunch, just enjoy some oysters. However, this turned into an extensive tasting of oysters, prawns, and sea bream carpaccio. All highly recommended, but especially the wafer-thinly sliced ​​sea bream fillets (raw, just a hint, but absolutely delicious). We consumed a total of 24 oysters, 6 prawns, and a plate of sea bream, along with bread and a bottle of wine. Even as a seafood dish, it was a substantial lunch. A special recommendation from our perspective.

name: Keith W
text:
Petit resto charmant, accueil chaleureux, service attentionné, une cuisine exceptionnelle. Je recommande fortement.
I was recommended to eat here. It did not disappoint. Highly recommended. I suggest you book a table
textTranslated:
Charming little restaurant, warm welcome, attentive service, exceptional cuisine. I highly recommend it.

I was recommended to eat here. It did not disappoint. Highly recommended. I suggest you book a table.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Magnus
text:
The prize level indicate a professional top notch kitchen but much of
the food does not deliver. Without the perfect old town Antibes location they would struggle. Some of the food felt like it was prepared last week and stayed to long in the fridge. To be fair some dishes where
ok, service ok and the wine recommended was really good. But the price level is crazy, 70% to high. The Michelin guide can’t be trusted.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Valoche siegel
text:
Accueil correct, service excellent par une seule personne qui s'est démenée. Repas très bon, mais très calibré. Ce qui est curieux, c'est la déco qui ne correspond pas à un restaurant gastronomique.
Petit hic : un morceau de verre dans l'entrée, ça peut arriver mais on offre un café ou un digestif pour compenser...bref on a passé un bon moment  mais des améliorations sont à réaliser. Félicitation au serveur, adorable.
textTranslated:
The welcome was adequate, and the service was excellent, provided by a single person who went above and beyond. The meal was very good, but very standardized. Oddly enough, the decor didn't match that of a fine-dining restaurant.

One small issue: a piece of glass in the entrance. These things happen, but they offered a coffee or a digestif to compensate... In short, we had a pleasant time, but there's room for improvement. Kudos to the waiter, who was lovely.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Klaas Pieter Roemeling
text: In het centrum van Antibes, verscholen in een van de zijstraatjes zit dit kleine maar super goede restaurant
textTranslated: In the center of Antibes, hidden in one of the side streets, sits this small but excellent restaurant.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Bacos Mireille
text:
Un endroit calmeoù l’on peut déguster une cuisine raffinée , discuter entre famille ou amis
Les produits de saison : asperges vertes délicieuses le turbot est bien servi
Le pain à l’encre de seiche accompagné de beurre citronné parfait
Déjeuner pascal réussi
textTranslated:
A peaceful place where you can enjoy refined cuisine and chat with family or friends.
Seasonal produce: delicious green asparagus, the turbot is a generous portion.
The squid ink bread with lemon butter is perfect.
A successful Easter lunch.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Nora Bucher
text: The lighting was too bright
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: david vp
text: Excellent, à tout point de vue !
textTranslated: Excellent, in every respect!
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Arnaud Haegeman
text: Cuisine excellente dans un lieu très intimiste
textTranslated: Excellent cuisine in a very intimate setting.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: BERNARD Gérald
text: Très bonne cuisine, service souriant et éfficace, soirée agréable !
textTranslated: Excellent food, friendly and efficient service, a pleasant evening!
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Clare Wallis
text: We really enjoyed our meal here. Friendly service and great food, beautifully presented. Recommended for a special occasion.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Philippe Marchay
text:
Le resto ne paye pas de mine, mais quelle belle surprise dans l'assiette. Le menu dégustation est une merveille, tres bien accompagné de l'accord vin-met proposé.
A faire et refaire.
textTranslated: The restaurant doesn't look like much, but what a pleasant surprise awaits on the plate! The tasting menu is wonderful, perfectly complemented by the suggested wine pairing. A must-try, and I'll definitely be back.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Andrea Vismara
text: Tasting menu: some dishes were excellent, while others could be improved. Impeccable service, but the atmosphere wasn't great—the downstairs dining room is closed during winter
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Alessandro
text: Delicious food and good service
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Hans-Georg Ehrhardt-Gerst
text: Sehr empfehlenswert!
textTranslated: Highly recommended!
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Arnoult Morrone
text: Pour un dîner de saint Valentin : Cuisine gastronomique sans aucune fausse note, une carte des vins assez fournie permettant un super accord mets vins, la cuisine mérite peut être un service un peu plus affirmé et personnalisé, le cadre est très authentique et agréable, rapport qualité prix plutôt dans la fourchette haute. Très bonne expérience.
textTranslated: For a Valentine's Day dinner: Gourmet cuisine without a single flaw, a fairly extensive wine list allowing for excellent food and wine pairings, the service could perhaps be a little more assertive and personalized, the setting is very authentic and pleasant, and the value for money is rather high. A very good experience.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Jessica Jimenez
text:
Great place to celebrate your bday! The tasting menu was so good, super recomended.

In lugar especial para celebrar tu cumpleaños, el menú de platos pequeños es super recomendado.
textTranslated:
Great place to celebrate your birthday! The tasting menu was so good, highly recommended.

A special place to celebrate your birthday; the tasting menu is highly recommended.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: silvia anna ciafre
text: Ristorante piccolo, molto carino, personale gentilissimo e cibo molto buono. Cucina francese e raffinata.
textTranslated: Small, very nice restaurant, very friendly staff, and very good food. Refined French cuisine.
title: Restaurant L'Arazur

name: Chris F
text: What an amazing find in Old Antibes, we had a great dinner at L’Arazur. Great service, delicious dishes, bravo to the chef!
title: Restaurant L'Arazur
